response.overview: Kel Mitchell and Casper Smart in a hilarious holiday adventure as two down-on-their-luck thieves are invited to the heist of a lifetime! Amidst festive chaos, antics, and unexpected twists, they'll experience the wildest Christmas ever.  In the spirited tradition of National Lampoon's iconic Christmas films, "All I Stole for Christmas" promises laughter, mischief, and a whole lot of holiday cheer. Perfect for getting into the festive spirit!
response.title: All I Stole for Christmas

titles.title: National Lampoon's All I Stole for Christmas
